description: This prompt generates a photorealistic luxury-style portrait of an elegant woman in a plunging black outfit, ideal for fashion editorial or beauty imagery.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 此提示词生成照片级真实感的奢华风格肖像，展现穿着低胸黑色服装的优雅女性，适用于时尚大片或美妆图像。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 此提示詞生成照片級寫實的奢華風格肖像，展現穿著低胸黑色服裝的優雅女性，適用於時尚大片或美妝圖像。
description_i18n.ja: エレガントな黒のディープネック衣装を着た女性の、フォトリアルなラグジュアリースタイルのポートレートを生成します。ファッション誌やビューティー画像に最適です。
description_i18n.ko: 깊게 파인 블랙 의상을 입은 우아한 여성의 사실적인 럭셔리 스타일 초상화를 생성합니다. 패션 에디토리얼이나 뷰티 이미지에 이상적입니다.
description_i18n.de: Dieser Prompt generiert ein fotorealistisches Luxus-Porträt einer eleganten Frau in tief ausgeschnittener schwarzer Kleidung, ideal für Mode-Editorials oder Beauty-Bilder.
description_i18n.fr: Ce prompt génère un portrait photoréaliste de style luxueux d'une femme élégante en tenue noire décolletée, idéal pour les éditoriaux de mode ou les images beauté.
description_i18n.ru: Этот промпт генерирует фотореалистичный портрет в роскошном стиле элегантной женщины в черном наряде с глубоким вырезом, идеально подходящий для модных редакционных материалов или beauty-изображений.
description_i18n.es: Este prompt genera un retrato fotorrealista de estilo lujoso de una mujer elegante con atuendo negro escotado, ideal para editoriales de moda o imágenes de belleza.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Este prompt gera um retrato fotorrealista em estilo luxuoso de uma mulher elegante em roupa preta decotada, ideal para editoriais de moda ou imagens de beleza.
description_i18n.it: Questo prompt genera un ritratto fotorealistico in stile lussuoso di una donna elegante in un abito nero scollato, ideale per editoriali di moda o immagini beauty.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt này tạo ra chân dung chân thực phong cách xa hoa của người phụ nữ thanh lịch trong trang phục đen xẻ sâu, lý tưởng cho hình ảnh thời trang hoặc làm đẹp.
description_i18n.pl: Ten prompt generuje fotorealistyczny portret w luksusowym stylu eleganckiej kobiety w czarnej kreacji z głębokim dekoltem, idealny do edytoriali modowych lub zdjęć beauty.
description_i18n.id: Prompt ini menghasilkan potret fotorealistik bergaya mewah dari wanita elegan mengenakan pakaian hitam berbelahan rendah, ideal untuk editorial fashion atau citra kecantikan.
description_i18n.nl: Deze prompt genereert een fotorealistisch luxe portret van een elegante vrouw in diep uitgesneden zwarte kleding, ideaal voor moderedacties of beautybeelden.
description_i18n.ar: ينشئ هذا الأمر صورة شخصية فوتوغرافية واقعية بأسلوب فاخر لامرأة أنيقة ترتدي زيًا أسود منخفض الصدر، مثالية لصور الموضة التحريرية أو صور الجمال.
description_i18n.tr: Bu prompt, derin dekolteli siyah kıyafet giyen zarif bir kadının fotogerçekçi lüks tarzda portresini oluşturur, moda editöryalleri veya güzellik görselleri için idealdir.
description_i18n.uk: Цей промпт генерує фотореалістичний портрет у розкішному стилі елегантної жінки в чорному вбранні з глибоким вирізом, ідеальний для модних редакційних матеріалів або beauty-зображень.
description_i18n.en: This prompt generates a photorealistic luxury-style portrait of an elegant woman in a plunging black outfit, ideal for fashion editorial or beauty imagery.

query.en: A photorealistic half-body portrait of an elegant glamorous woman indoors, framed vertically from the upper chest to just above the head, standing slightly angled toward the camera with a poised, confident presence. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} long loose wavy hair with a soft tousled texture, warm lightly tanned skin, and a slender neck and shoulders. She wears a fitted black long-sleeve dress or top with a very deep plunging V neckline in finely pleated fabric, creating a sleek sensual evening look, plus 1 delicate gold chain necklace with 1 small round pendant resting at the base of her neck. Use flattering warm ambient lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, and a luxurious modern interior background with creamy beige walls, a blurred warm lamp glow on the left, and a bright window or doorway edge on the right. The mood is refined, feminine, and high-end, like a fashion editorial portrait of {argument name="subject" default="a beautiful woman"}, shot with realistic skin texture, subtle natural makeup, cinematic bokeh, and premium lifestyle photography styling.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：A photorealistic half-body portrait of an elegant glamorous woman indoors, framed vertically from the upper chest to just above the head, standing slightly angled toward the camera with a poised, confident presence. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} long loose wavy hair with a soft tousled texture, warm lightly tanned skin, and a slender neck and shoulders. She wears a fitted black long-sleeve dress or top with a very deep plunging V neckline in finely pleated fabric, creating a sleek sensual evening look, plus 1 delicate gold chain necklace with 1 small round pendant resting at the base of her neck. Use flattering warm ambient lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, and a luxurious modern interior background with creamy beige walls, a blurred warm lamp glow on the left, and a bright window or doorway edge on the right. The mood is refined, feminine, and high-end, like a fashion editorial portrait of {argument name="subject" default="a beautiful woman"}, shot with realistic skin texture, subtle natural makeup, cinematic bokeh, and premium lifestyle photography styling.
